raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tà jakka tas KUNGS:
Sargajtees pee juhsahn Dweh-
felehın/ un ne nefteet nekahdu
Nastu Swehdeená/ un ne wed-
deet neneeka zaur Jerusalemes
Wahrtim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ile iſweddeet arridsan
ne kahdu Nastu no juhteem Nam-
meem Swehdeená/ un ne dar-
røjt ne kahdu Darbu/ bet freh-
tijeet to Swehdeenü/ ka es juh-
fu Tehweem efimu paweblejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee ne irr klaufijscht/
neds fatwas Ausis atgreesufcht/
bet irr fatwu Bataufu apzeeti-
nafschi/ un ne klaufijscht/ un to
Pamahzischannu ne peenchmuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu tas notiks/ ja
juhs mannis labbi klaufifeet/fak-
ka tas KUNGS: Un ne weddi-
feet ne kahdu Nastu zaur fcha
Pilssahta Wahrtim Swehdee-
ná/ un fwehtifeet to Swehdee-
nu/ ne darridami ne kahdu Dar-
bu eeksch tahs/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ees zaur fcha Pilss-
fahta Wahrtim Rehnizi un Lee-
li-Kungi/ kas fehsch us Dahwi-
da Gohda-Krehflu/ un brauz ar
Ratteem un Sirgeem/ tee pa-
schi/ un winnu Leeli-Kungi/ tee
Wihri no Juhda/ un tee Eedsih-
wotaji no Jerusalemes/ un fchis
Pilssfahts taps eedsihwohts muh-
fehtgi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nahks no teem
wiſſahtcem Juhda/ un kas ap-
Jerusalemi/ un no Ben-
Seimmes/ un no Ee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "leijahin/ un no Kalneem/ un
Deenas-Widdus/ un atneffii
Dedsaimo-Uppuri/ un zittu U
puri/ un Ehdamo-Uppuri/ u
Wihraku/ un peeneffibs Tei
fchanas-Uppuri ta KUNG
Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja juhs mannis
klaufifeet/ ka juhs to Swehdee
nu fwehttijat/ un Nastas Swe-
deena zaur Jerusalemes Wah-
tim nefrat/ tad eededsinaschu e
winnas Wahrtis weenu Uggu
ni/ kas Jerusalemes skaistu
Namnus aprihs/ un ue tap-
apdschsts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Deews runna no fawa Spehka/ uu itt ka ta
Mahls eekch Pohdneeka Rohkasrr: 1/2
Lapatt warr wiꞥsch arri toha Judus us fa-
wu Agreescbanu no Grehkeem usturreht.
8. Jeb us fawu Pahrgalwibu tohs fa-
maitaht: 10. Jeremius grib Jsglahbjscha-
nu prett fawo Cenaidneeko affinaieem Pa-
dohmeeni: 18/20.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ehis irr tas Wahrdg/
kas uhs Jeremiju no-
tifke no ta KUNGA/
kas fazziia:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Zellees/ un no etj Pohd-
neeka Namna/ un tur liifschu
es tew mannis Wahrdus dsir-
deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nogahju es Pohdnee-
ka Namna/ un raugi/ wiꞥsch
darrija kahdu Darbu us to
Skritteli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Pohds/ fo wiꞥsch
no Mahleem darrija/ ue isde-
wahs ta Pohdneeka Rohka/ tad
darrija wiꞥsch no ta attat wee-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
